content: Hello, I currently have a PC with an RTX 4070 Super running Gentoo. I'm interested in testing the driver regardless of completion level, but I already am using Nouveau instead of the proprietary driver for philosophical reasons. Is there a way I can test around what's currently in Nova with this configuration?

finally i'm not the only furry
anyway-I think you can load the driver on some cards, but it's worth noting that I think the only thing it actually does at this point is just load the GSP-RM firmware.
The only steps would really just be booting the system without nouveau loaded and loading nova, but all it's going to do is just print a message saying it initialized
